skills.name: exam-001-aqstoqflow-risk-suite-orchestrator
skills.purpose: orchestrate the ordered AqStoqFlow risk-remediation suite, preserve the current green baseline, select the next eligible skill, and prevent overlapping remediation work
skills.risk: Risk remediation can fragment into duplicate or out-of-order work, leaving high-risk service-boundary problems unresolved while later production features advance.

skills.name: exam-002-aqstoqflow-service-boundary-ratchets
skills.purpose: add and ratchet service-boundary gates that detect direct Prisma access outside services and action-owned economic mutations
skills.risk: Direct Prisma in App Router, components, hooks, or server actions can bypass tenant scope, RBAC, typed errors, audit evidence, and service-owned business rules.

skills.name: exam-003-aqstoqflow-tenant-rbac-hardener
skills.purpose: harden tenant isolation, trusted organization derivation, RBAC, module gates, fresh-auth, and same-actor controls across services/actions/routes
skills.risk: Some legacy actions and routes still accept or pass caller-supplied organization scope, and same-actor segregation is not proven across every sensitive workflow.

skills.name: exam-004-aqstoqflow-inventory-item-finalizer
skills.purpose: migrate inventory and item legacy actions into service-owned inventory/item workflows, remove mock inventory paths, and preserve the inventory boundary gate
skills.risk: Old inventory and item actions still expose direct item mutation, stock update, transfer/reservation helpers, hard deletes, and mock inventory data adjacent to the modern inventory kernel.

skills.name: exam-005-aqstoqflow-purchasing-ap-consolidator
skills.purpose: resolve split ownership between legacy purchase-order workflows and newer purchasing/AP controls
skills.risk: AP controls can be bypassed through legacy purchase-order code with raw errors, direct Prisma orchestration, hard deletes, and old receiving workflows.

skills.name: exam-006-aqstoqflow-hard-delete-immutability-gate
skills.purpose: classify and eliminate unsafe hard deletes for evidence-bearing records while adding a reusable hard-delete policy gate
skills.risk: Hard deletes can remove economic or audit evidence and bypass cancellation, reversal, soft-delete, or corrective event discipline.

skills.name: exam-007-aqstoqflow-error-response-normalizer
skills.purpose: replace raw errors and unsafe route/action leakage with typed domain errors and safe client responses
skills.risk: Raw throw/rethrow/console error patterns can leak internals, create inconsistent UX, and bypass enterprise error classifications.

skills.name: exam-008-aqstoqflow-business-event-audit-standardizer
skills.purpose: migrate older economic workflows to immutable BusinessEvent, AuditLog, idempotency, source-link, outbox, and ledger evidence patterns
skills.risk: Older mutations and deletes may not consistently emit business events, audit logs, outbox evidence, idempotency keys, or ledger source links.

skills.name: exam-009-aqstoqflow-demo-mock-report-trust-cleaner
skills.display: Exam 009 Demo Mock Report Trust Cleaner
skills.purpose: remove or quarantine production-visible mock/demo data and make reports show provenance, freshness, certification, and source status
skills.risk: Mock inventory/report/monitoring paths and report TODOs can make dashboards appear more trustworthy than the backing evidence allows.
verification: rg -n "Mock implementation|mockItems|mockTransactions|mockAdjustments|mockTransfers|demo route" actions app components lib services

skills.name: exam-010-aqstoqflow-close-certification-hardener
skills.purpose: harden close-pack certification readiness, automatic stale invalidation, inventory valuation annexes, and explicit statutory blockers
skills.risk: System evidence certification exists, but statutory certification must remain blocked while recertification triggers and deeper inventory valuation assurance are incomplete.

skills.name: exam-011-aqstoqflow-offline-pos-replay-finalizer
skills.purpose: convert PENDING_REPLAY offline POS envelopes into final POS, inventory, payment, drawer, fiscal, and ledger effects through existing services
skills.risk: Offline POS sync currently captures evidence and blockers, but accepted envelopes cannot yet become final legal/accounting truth safely.
verification: npm test -- services/pos services/inventory services/compliance services/accounting --runInBand

skills.name: exam-012-aqstoqflow-compliance-country-pack-production-gate
skills.purpose: move compliance and country-pack readiness toward production without allowing fake statutory claims
skills.risk: Compliance adapters and Cameroon country-pack values still include sandbox and expert-review blockers, so legal production certification must remain blocked.

skills.name: exam-013-aqstoqflow-payment-recon-production-hardener
skills.purpose: harden payment reconciliation for production provider feeds, statement channels, export signing, suspense posting, and provider-account completeness
skills.risk: Payment reconciliation has durable in-app infrastructure, but production provider credentials/channels, external statements, signing, and completeness gates remain incomplete.

skills.name: exam-014-aqstoqflow-payroll-statutory-hardener
skills.purpose: harden payroll statutory parameters, country-pack integration, filing readiness, approval/payment immutability, corrective runs, and payroll ledger evidence
skills.risk: Payroll foundations exist, but real statutory country parameters, filing adapters, expert validation, and operational hardening remain incomplete.

skills.name: exam-015-aqstoqflow-ci-release-gate-modernizer
skills.purpose: modernize CI and release gates so Prisma, typecheck, lint, tests, build, and policy scanners enforce enterprise readiness
skills.risk: Build currently skips lint, next lint is deprecated, and policy gates are not fully ratcheted into a release-ready CI command.
